acceptance_results.criterion: docker-compose.yml subscription service removes checked-in database credential material.
Subscription DB config uses env inputs for credential-bearing fields, defaults host routing to the Docker database service, and preserves literal SSL mode.
Root .env.example documents safe placeholder values for compose-required variables.
TMP-021 evidence distinguishes config hygiene completion from remaining runtime/provider blockers.

completed_work: Removed checked-in subscription service database credential material from docker-compose.yml.
Defaulted local subscription DB host routing to the Docker database service and preserved literal SSL mode.
Added root .env.example with safe placeholders for compose-required variables.
Updated release and TMP-021 evidence so config render is verified while runtime start remains blocked until real env/provider values and the required Docker network are supplied.
known_gaps: Full compose runtime start remains blocked until real env/provider values and the required local Docker network are supplied.
